rawAssistant: Welcome to my humble shop, friend! I see you're looking well-prepared for your journey. That new charm hoop of yours is quite the find - it's said to bring a bit of good fortune to those who travel the north road. The fresh signs on one side are certainly worth investigating; they might just lead you to some answers about these lowland glows.
